title: Sqlitelogictest: Range query between NULL values not possible
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab2 (id UInt64, name String, value Nullable(Int32), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO tab2 (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM tab2 WHERE value IS NULL OR (value BETWEEN NULL AND 20);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tab2 WHERE created_at IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Range query between NULL values fails
